action.reasoning: Observation: Initial setup uses TripoSR zero-shot (appropriate for task, dummy checkpoint created), but prior command failed due to invalid assumption on object UID '000000' during data inspection (FileNotFound). predict.py ignores cameras.json and uses default n_views=11 render (may mismatch target poses, leading to higher LPIPS); has testing limit of 3 objs. No eval score or time measurement yet. Analysis: TripoSR API and data structure need inspection to enable camera-aware rendering later; must remove hard limit in predict.py (eval requires all 100 test objs) but add optional --num_objects arg for safe local testing. This follows workflow: validate pipeline with test run on val subset then submit_eval for baseline LPIPS + iteration time. Decision: Update predict.py, run combined inspection+test command (data/meta/cameras + model render signature + predict on 3 val objs), then submit_eval with current best.pt to get initial metric.
action.command:
python -c '
import json
from pathlib import Path
import sys
print("=== Data Inspection ===")
data_dir = Path("/data")
meta = json.load(open(data_dir / "meta.json"))
print("Meta:", meta)
train_dir = data_dir / "train"
object_dirs = [d for d in train_dir.iterdir() if d.is_dir()]
print("Train objects found:", len(object_dirs))
first_obj = sorted(object_dirs)[0]
print("First UID:", first_obj.name)
print("Files:", [p.name for p in first_obj.iterdir()])
cams = json.load(open(first_obj / "cameras.json"))
print("Num cameras:", len(cams))
print("First camera:", cams[0])
print("Last camera:", cams[-1])
print("\n=== Model Inspection ===")
sys.path.insert(0, "/opt/triposr")
from tsr.system import TSR
import inspect
print("TSR.render signature:", inspect.signature(TSR.render))
print("TSR.render doc:", TSR.render.__doc__ or "No docstring")
' && python predict.py --data_path /data/val --checkpoint checkpoints/best.pt --output /tmp/test.json --num_objects 3
